title: hedlundia hornadensis
side_effects: Hedlundia hornadensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. In severe cases, it can also lead to more serious complications, such as liver damage and kidney failure. Some individuals have reported experiencing headaches, dizziness, and tremors after consuming the plant in excessive amounts. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using hedlundia hornadensis to ensure safe and proper usage.
